name: Greek Charoset
recipeIngredient: Orange, unpeeled, seeds removed and cut into 8 pieces.
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, chop the orange coarsely.
2. Add raisins and dates and process until finely chopped.
3. Transfer to a medium-sized saucepan and stir in preserves, wine, ginger, and cayenne.
4. Bring to a simmer. Cover and cook over the lowest heat for 8 to 10 minutes until thick, stirring often to prevent any sticking.
5. Stir in pine nuts. Makes 1 1/4 cups. Note: May be kept refrigerated up to 1 week.
